title: The Marceau Execution System
subtitle: Zero to $10K/mo — A Complete Operating System Built on Saraev, Hormozi & Humiston Principles
author: William Marceau | Marceau Solutions
content_markdown:
## Why This Plan Will Work

This isn't motivation. This is an operating system built on three proven frameworks, mapped to your exact assets, constraints, and market position.

**Nick Saraev** built a solo automation business to $72K/month with 94% margins. His core insight: stop building custom projects — productize, duplicate, and scale templated systems. You have 38 live automations. You've already done the hard part. You just haven't sold any of them.

**Alex Hormozi** built Gym Launch from zero to $100M+. His core insight: the offer is everything. Most people fail not because their service is bad, but because their offer is invisible and underpriced. Your $197/mo coaching sits in what he calls the "dead zone" — too expensive for impulse buyers, too cheap to fund real client acquisition.

**Ryan Humiston** grew to 2.2M subscribers and built a fitness media empire. His core insight: solve the viewer's problem in the first 10 seconds, give away your best content for free, and monetize with low-friction digital products. His marketing background (former SEO professional) is the hidden weapon — and you have the same advantage as someone who builds AI tools.

The synthesis: **Saraev's productized service model + Hormozi's offer engineering + Humiston's content-first monetization = your playbook.**

---

## PHASE 0: THE RESET (Days 1-3)

### Mindset Recalibration

You have been building. Now you sell. Building without selling is a hobby. The infrastructure you've created is genuinely impressive — but infrastructure doesn't pay bills. Revenue does.

Hormozi's Rule: **"You are one offer away."** Not one tool, not one automation, not one more feature. One offer that someone wants badly enough to pay for today.

Saraev's Rule: **"Productized services take 1/100th the time of custom work."** You don't need new skills. You need to package what you already have.

### The Three Businesses You're Running (Pick Two)

You cannot do all three at full intensity with your health constraints. Pick two. Here's the framework:

| Business | Hormozi Market Score | Your Readiness | Energy Required | Verdict |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| AI Automation Services | 9/10 (massive demand, businesses in pain) | 9/10 (38 workflows, n8n mastery) | Medium (async, project-based) | **PRIMARY** |
| Fitness Coaching & Content | 8/10 (evergreen market, your story is the moat) | 7/10 (infrastructure built, no audience yet) | High on film days, Low otherwise | **SECONDARY** |
| SaaS/Product (DumbPhone, ClaimBack) | 7/10 (scalable but speculative) | 3/10 (MVPs not shipped) | Very High (full product lifecycle) | **PARK IT** |

**Decision: AI Automation Services is your cash engine. Fitness is your brand and long-term wealth builder. Everything else waits.**

---

## PHASE 1: OFFER ENGINEERING (Days 1-7)

### Step 1: Build Your AI Services Grand Slam Offer

Using Hormozi's Grand Slam Offer framework:

**Dream Outcome for the client:** "My business runs itself while I sleep. Leads come in automatically. Follow-ups happen without me. I never miss a customer again."

**The Value Equation:**
- Dream Outcome (maximize): Automated lead gen + follow-up + operations
- Perceived Likelihood of Success (maximize): Show YOUR live dashboards, YOUR 38 workflows as proof
- Time Delay (minimize): "Your system is live in 7 days, not 7 months"
- Effort & Sacrifice (minimize): "We build it. We maintain it. You just watch the leads come in."

**Your Productized AI Services Menu (Saraev model — templated, duplicatable):**

| System | What It Does | Build Time | Price |
|---|---|---|---|
| AI Lead Engine | Automated lead capture + qualification + CRM entry | 1 day (you have this) | $2,500 setup + $500/mo |
| Smart Follow-Up System | Multi-channel nurture sequences (email + SMS) | 1 day (you have this) | $2,000 setup + $500/mo |
| AI Receptionist/Chatbot | 24/7 customer response + booking | 2 days | $3,000 setup + $750/mo |
| Operations Autopilot | Invoice, scheduling, review requests automated | 1-2 days | $2,500 setup + $500/mo |
| Full Business Automation Stack | All of the above bundled | 5-7 days | $7,500 setup + $1,500/mo |

**Hormozi Enhancers (make the offer irresistible):**
- **Guarantee:** "If your system doesn't generate 10 qualified leads in the first 30 days, I'll work for free until it does."
- **Bonuses:** Free monthly optimization call. Free quarterly audit. Emergency support within 4 hours.
- **Scarcity:** "I take 5 clients per quarter. I manage every system personally."
- **Urgency:** "Onboarding slots fill up — I build every system myself, so capacity is limited."

### Step 2: Build Your Fitness Offer (Hormozi-Style)

**Kill the $197/mo 1:1 model.** Hormozi is crystal clear: that price point is the dead zone. Too expensive to be an impulse buy. Too cheap to deliver real transformation or fund client acquisition.

**New Offer Architecture:**

| Tier | What | Price | Target |
|---|---|---|---|
| Free Content | YouTube/IG (Humiston model) | $0 | Build audience, establish authority |
| Digital Program | 30-day evidence-based program (Humiston model — $19.99) | $19.99 one-time | Volume sales, list building |
| Group Coaching | "Defy the Odds" 90-day cohort — weekly group calls, app-delivered programming, community | $97/mo | Core revenue, scalable |
| Premium 1:1 | 90-day transformation with daily check-ins, custom peptide protocol, direct access | $1,500 one-time (or $597/mo x 3) | High-ticket, limited spots |

**Why this works (Hormozi math):**
- Old model: 10 clients x $197 = $1,970/mo (and you're burned out)
- New model: 200 digital sales/yr ($4K) + 20 group members ($1,940/mo) + 3 premium clients ($4,500) = **$10,340/mo** with less 1:1 time

**The "Defy the Odds" Offer (your flagship):**
- Name uses Hormozi's M.A.G.I.C. formula: Magnetic, Aspirational, Goal-oriented, Interval-based, Container
- "The 90-Day Defy the Odds Transformation" — for people who train through adversity, not despite it
- Your story IS the marketing. Brain cancer. Dystonia. Still training. That's not a pitch — that's proof.

---

## PHASE 2: CLIENT ACQUISITION — THE RULE OF 100 (Days 7-37)

Hormozi's Rule of 100: Do 100 primary actions every single day toward getting clients. No exceptions. This is the engine.

### Track A: AI Services (Primary Revenue)

**Week 1-2: Warm Outreach (Hormozi's "first 5 clients" playbook)**

1. **List everyone you know.** Every person in your phone, LinkedIn, Facebook, Naples contacts. Write them ALL down.
2. **The Magic Script (Hormozi):** "Hey [name], I'm launching an AI automation service for local businesses. I'm looking for 3 business owners who want to test it for free in exchange for a testimonial. Who do you know that might be interested?"
3. **Why free first (Hormozi philosophy):** Your first 3 clients are NOT revenue. They are proof. Testimonials. Case studies. Screenshots of their systems working. This is the ammunition you need for everything that follows.
4. **Target: 100 messages per day.** Text, DM, LinkedIn, Facebook. Every single day.
5. **Naples advantage:** You are local. You can walk into businesses. Saraev started by hitting 50-100 businesses per day door-to-door. You don't need to do that volume — but 5 in-person visits per day to Naples businesses (restaurants, HVAC companies, med spas, real estate offices) will land you meetings.

**Week 3-4: Cold Outreach (Saraev system)**

Once you have 1-3 free/beta clients producing results:

1. **Build your lead list:** Use Apollo.io or LinkedIn Sales Navigator. Target Naples-area businesses with 5-50 employees in: home services, med spas, dental, real estate, restaurants.
2. **Cold email sequence (Saraev template):**
- Email 1: "I noticed [business name] doesn't have automated follow-up for leads. I built a system for [similar business] that captured 23 leads in the first month. Want me to show you how it works? Takes 15 minutes."
- Email 2 (day 3): "Quick follow-up — the system I mentioned runs 24/7 and costs less than one employee's weekly wage. Here's a 2-minute video of it in action. [Loom link]"
- Email 3 (day 7): "Last note — I'm taking on 2 more clients this month. If automated lead capture isn't a priority right now, no worries. But if it is, this week is ideal. [Calendar link]"
3. **Volume:** 50-100 cold emails per day using Apollo.io's built-in email sequencing (free tier available). Saraev's data: 1-3% reply rate = 1-3 meetings per day at 100 emails.
4. **Loom videos are your weapon:** Record 2-minute personalized Looms showing the prospect's specific pain point and how you'd solve it. This is Saraev's highest-converting tactic.

**Week 4+: Close and Deliver**

- First 3 clients: FREE (exchange for testimonial + case study)
- Clients 4-5: 50% off ($1,250 setup + $250/mo retainer)
- Client 6+: Full price ($2,500+ setup + $500+/mo retainer)
- Hormozi progression: He went from free training → $500 → $1,000 → $3,000. Follow the same arc. Earn the right to charge more by stacking proof.

### Track B: Fitness Content & Coaching (Brand Builder)

**The Humiston Content System (adapted for your story):**

Humiston's formula: Problem → Science → Solution → Demo → Call-to-action. 10 minutes. No fluff.

**Your first 10 videos (SEO-driven topics with your unique angle):**

1. "I Have Brain Cancer. Here's Why I Still Train Every Day."
2. "Training With Dystonia — 5 Exercises That Actually Work"
3. "The Peptide Protocol That Changed My Recovery (Tesamorelin Deep Dive)"
4. "How to Train When Your Body Fights You (Evidence-Based Approach)"
5. "GH Secretagogues Explained — What the Science Actually Says"
6. "Full Workout for People With Neurological Conditions"
7. "Why Most Fitness Advice Fails Chronically Ill People"
8. "My Cancer Diagnosis Changed How I Program Workouts — Here's How"
9. "5 Exercises Every Person With a Movement Disorder Should Know"
10. "The Honest Truth About Training Through Chemotherapy"

**Why these will work (Humiston principles applied):**
- Every title solves a SPECIFIC problem (SEO intent)
- Your personal story is the hook no one else can replicate
- The peptide/science content overlaps with Humiston's trending topic areas
- The "training with limitations" niche is MASSIVELY underserved — millions of people with chronic conditions want fitness content that speaks to them

**Production approach (energy-managed):**
- Batch film on HIGH energy days: 3-4 videos in one session
- Edit using your AI video tools (media tower)
- Publish 2x/week consistently (Humiston posts ~2x/week)
- Thumbnail: bold text, your physique, high contrast (Humiston style)
- Shorts/Reels from each long-form video (3-5 clips per video)

**Monetization path (Humiston model):**
- Months 1-3: Free content only. Build audience. Zero sales pressure.
- Month 3: Launch $19.99 digital program ("The Defy the Odds Training System" — 30-day program for people training through health challenges)
- Month 4: Open group coaching waitlist ($97/mo)
- Month 6: Launch premium 1:1 tier ($1,500) — only when demand justifies it

---

## PHASE 3: SYSTEMS & AUTOMATION (Ongoing)

### Your Unfair Advantage: You Automate Your Own Business

Saraev charges clients $2,000-5,000/month for systems you already have running. Apply them to yourself:

**AI Services Business Automation:**
- Lead capture: Already built (n8n workflows)
- Follow-up sequences: Already built (nurture workflows)
- Client onboarding: Already built (payment → welcome flow)
- Proposal generation: Build a Loom + PDF auto-generator (you have branded_pdf_engine.py)
- Invoice/payment: Stripe already integrated

**Fitness Business Automation:**
- Content scheduling: Use media tower tools
- Email nurture for new subscribers: Already built (7-day sequences)
- Program delivery: Automate via n8n → email/app delivery
- Check-in reminders: Already built (Monday check-in workflow)
- Testimonial collection: Automate post-program survey + review request

**The meta-play:** When prospects ask "how do you know this works?" you show them YOUR business running on the same systems. Your business IS the demo.

---

## PHASE 4: SCALING (Months 3-6)

### The Hormozi Scaling Ladder

Hormozi's 2026 advice (Episode 977): Start with premium 1:1 service (like Tesla's Roadster strategy). Use it to fund and refine. Then scale down-market with proof.

**Month 3 target state:**
- 3 paying AI services clients ($1,500-3,000/mo total)
- 500+ YouTube subscribers, 10+ videos published
- 1 digital fitness product live ($19.99)
- First group coaching cohort forming

**Month 6 target state:**
- 5 paying AI services clients ($3,000-5,000/mo total)
- 2,000+ YouTube subscribers, 25+ videos published
- Group coaching with 10+ members ($970+/mo)
- 1-2 premium 1:1 coaching clients ($1,000-1,500/mo)
- Total: $5,000-8,000/mo

**Month 12 target state:**
- AI services: 8-10 clients on retainer ($6,000-10,000/mo)
- Fitness content: 10K+ subscribers, consistent monetization
- Group coaching: 25+ members ($2,425+/mo)
- Digital products: Passive income stream ($500-1,000/mo)
- Total: $10,000-15,000/mo

---

## THE DAILY OPERATING SYSTEM

### Energy-Adapted Daily Schedule

Your health means you can't grind 16 hours. But you CAN be strategic about how you spend 4-6 focused hours.

**HIGH Energy Day (2-3 per week):**

| Time | Activity | Framework |
|---|---|---|
| 5:00-7:00 | Training (athletic program) | Humiston: train hard, recover |
| 7:00-7:30 | Review dashboards + metrics | Saraev: data-driven decisions |
| 7:30-9:30 | Outreach — 100 actions (emails, DMs, calls, in-person) | Hormozi: Rule of 100 |
| 9:30-12:00 | Client delivery / system building OR content filming | Saraev: productized delivery |
| 12:00-1:00 | Lunch | Recovery |
| 1:00-3:00 | AI services work OR content editing + scheduling | Flex block |
| 3:30-4:30 | Spanish Study | Personal development |

**MEDIUM Energy Day (2-3 per week):**

| Time | Activity | Framework |
|---|---|---|
| 5:00-7:00 | Training (athletic program) | Adaptation |
| 7:00-7:30 | Review dashboards | Automated via n8n |
| 7:30-9:00 | Outreach — 50 actions (email/DM only, no calls) | Hormozi: volume still matters |
| 9:00-12:00 | Edit content / write copy / build proposals | Async work |
| 12:00-1:00 | Lunch | Recovery |
| 1:00-3:00 | Client delivery (async — Loom updates, system tweaks) | Saraev: async delivery |
| 3:30-4:30 | Spanish Study | Personal development |

**LOW Energy Day (1-2 per week):**

| Time | Activity | Framework |
|---|---|---|
| 5:00-7:00 | Light training or Day 3 mobility session | Recovery |
| When ready | Check automated reports (n8n sends to you) | Systems work FOR you |
| 30 min | Reply to urgent messages only | Triage |
| 30 min | Light admin / approve automated outputs | Maintenance |
| Rest | Recovery. Your systems run without you. | This is why you built them. |

**TREATMENT Day:**

| Time | Activity |
|---|---|
| Optional | Left hand extension protocol + Day 3 breathing only |
| All day | Zero business obligation. Clawdbot handles Telegram. n8n handles workflows. Automated sequences continue. |

---

What gets measured gets managed. Track these numbers every Sunday night.

| Metric | Week 1-2 Target | Week 3-4 Target | Month 2+ Target |

## THE FIRST 7 DAYS — EXACT ACTIONS

### Day 1 — Monday (HIGH ENERGY: AI Services Focus)
- 5-7am: Train (Day 1 Athletic Power + Locomotion)
- 7:30-9:30am: Send first 50 warm outreach messages using Hormozi's magic script
- 9:30-11:30am: Write your AI services offer document. Save as branded PDF. Set up Apollo.io email sequences (free tier — handles both prospecting and sequencing).
- 12-1pm: Sales principles study (Hormozi Grand Slam Offer framework)
- 1-3pm: List every person you know who owns or manages a business. Goal: 200+ names. Create Calendly booking link for AI services discovery calls.
- 3:30-4:30pm: Spanish Study

### Day 2 — Tuesday (HIGH ENERGY: Content + Outreach)
- 5-7am: Train (Day 2 Upper Body Flow)
- 7:30-9:30am: Send 50 more warm outreach messages (100 total across Mon-Tue)
- 9:30-12pm: Set up YouTube channel (banner, about, links). Film your first YouTube video: "I Have Brain Cancer. Here's Why I Still Train Every Day."
- 1-2:30pm: Create a 2-minute Loom demo video showing one of your live n8n automations. Edit YouTube video.
- 2:30-3:30pm: Follow up on any outreach replies from Monday
- 3:30-4:30pm: Spanish Study

### Day 3 — Wednesday (MEDIUM ENERGY: Prospecting + Cold Systems)
- 5-7am: Train (Day 3 Active Recovery + Mobility + Left Hand Protocol)
- 7:30-9am: Sign up for Apollo.io (free tier). Build first cold prospect list: Naples businesses, 5-50 employees. Write your 3-email cold sequence.
- 9-11am: Walk into 5 Naples businesses and introduce yourself. Leave the AI services one-pager.
- 11am-12pm: Record personalized Loom demos for any warm prospects
- 1-2:30pm: Follow up on all open conversations from Mon-Tue
- 2:30-3:30pm: Sales study — objection handling scripts
- 3:30-4:30pm: Spanish Study

### Day 4 — Thursday (HIGH ENERGY: Content + Outreach)
- 5-7am: Train (Day 4 Lower Body Athleticism)
- 7:30-9:30am: 100 outreach actions (warm + cold now that Apollo.io sequences are loaded)
- 9:30-12pm: Publish first YouTube video. Create 3 Shorts/Reels from it. Film second YouTube video (pick from the list of 10).
- 1-2pm: Edit and schedule second video
- 2-3:30pm: Fitness offer development — draft the "Defy the Odds" group coaching structure
- 3:30-4:30pm: Spanish Study

### Day 5 — Friday (MEDIUM ENERGY: Review + Delivery)
- 5-7am: Train (Day 5 Full Body Integration)
- 7:30-9am: 50 outreach actions (lighter day — quality follow-ups to the week's best leads)
- 9-10am: Weekly scorecard — fill out all metrics from the week
- 10am-12pm: Take any discovery calls booked. Build your one-page AI services landing page (website-builder tools).
- 1-2pm: Weekly review — what worked, what didn't, plan next week
- 2-3pm: Peptide research (1 hour — must produce 1 content idea)
- 3:30-4:30pm: Spanish Study

### Day 6 — Saturday (LOW ENERGY: Recovery)
- Optional: Light training or walk
- 30 min: Check automated reports, reply to urgent messages only
- If energy permits: Edit and schedule second YouTube video. Write fitness lead magnet PDF.
- Otherwise: REST. Your systems run without you. Recharge for Monday.
- No outreach. No prospecting. Recovery day.

### Day 7 — Sunday (PLANNING)
- 9-10:30am: Fill out weekly scorecard. Review what worked and what didn't.
- 10:30-11:30am: Plan next week's content topics and outreach targets. Schedule any queued content.
- Rest of day: Recovery. Left hand extension protocol if desired.

---

## CRITICAL PRINCIPLES (Your Operating Rules)

### From Saraev:
1. **Productize everything.** Never build custom. Duplicate, duplicate, duplicate.
2. **Sell the outcome, not the automation.** Clients don't care about n8n. They care about leads and time savings.
3. **Loom is your sales weapon.** A 2-minute personalized video converts better than any email.
4. **Retainers over projects.** Monthly recurring revenue is the goal. One-time projects are a trap.
5. **You are already more technical than 95% of people selling AI services.** The gap is sales, not skill.

### From Hormozi:
1. **Volume solves all problems.** 100 actions per day. No exceptions on high/medium energy days.
2. **Free first, then charge more.** Your first 3 clients prove the model. Then price goes UP, not down.
3. **The offer IS the business.** If no one is buying, your offer sucks. Change the offer, not the effort.
4. **Speed to lead wins.** Respond to every inquiry within 5 minutes. Your automations can do this.
5. **Charge premium or free. Never in between.** The $197 dead zone dies today.

### From Humiston:
1. **Solve the problem in the first 10 seconds.** Every video, every email, every pitch — lead with the pain.
2. **Give away your best stuff for free.** The content builds trust. The paid product provides structure and accountability.
3. **Your story IS the content.** Cancer. Dystonia. Still training. That's not a disadvantage — it's the most compelling story in fitness.
4. **SEO-driven topic selection.** Don't guess what to make videos about. Research what people are searching for.
5. **Consistency beats perfection.** 2 good videos per week beats 1 perfect video per month.

### From Your Own Experience:
1. **Your health comes first.** A dead founder ships nothing. Treatment days are sacred.
2. **Your infrastructure is your moat.** 38 automations, 3 agents, branded PDF engine, n8n mastery — no one starting today has this.
3. **Embrace the Pain. Defy the Odds.** This isn't just a tagline. It's the thesis of everything you do — AI, fitness, life.

---

## IF YOU DO NOTHING ELSE

If you read this entire document and feel overwhelmed, do only these three things tomorrow:

1. **Send 50 messages** to people you know, asking who needs help automating their business.
2. **Film one video** about your story — cancer, dystonia, why you still train.
3. **Post it.**

That's it. Everything else follows from those three actions. The systems are built. The infrastructure is live. The only missing piece is you pressing "send" and "publish."

You are not lost. You are loaded. Now fire.
